items.description: Fix typo in Section 5.1: 'Single-child ablation, which ablates the top-k children simultaneously' should read 'Multi-child ablation'
Remove ALL causal/epistemic claims from H3. Steering experiment is broken (baseline=steered to 15 decimal places, t=NaN). Do not present as negative result.
Investigate why trained SAE absorption is deterministic at exactly 0.5 with std=0.0 across all 100 samples. Determine if the metric reduces to a geometric constant.
Rewrite abstract to remove unsupported claims: 'causal validation via steering' and 'competitive exclusion falsification' are not actual contributions.
Run multi-seed validation (seeds 42, 43, 44, 45, 46) as planned. Address zero-variance concern and config discrepancy (d_model=128 vs 512).
Execute H_Safe pilot (safety-critical feature absorption on Gemma Scope). This was rated 9/10 novelty and 'no training needed' but never executed.
Report H2 zero-inflation explicitly: 98.5% of features show zero absorption. Do not present rho=+0.17 as a meaningful pattern.

Reframe contributions to reflect actual results: (1) multi-child proportional ablation methodology, (2) evidence absorption is geometric, (3) honest negative results. Remove 'causal validation' and 'competitive exclusion falsification'.
Include experiment code in repository or provide detailed algorithmic description. Currently only result JSONs are present.
Fix section order: Limitations (5.5) should precede Future Directions (5.6).
Remove banned patterns: 'a growing body of work' appears twice. Replace with specific citations.
Add power calculation for H3: 'With n=7 absorbed features, power to detect d=0.5 at alpha=0.01 is approximately 18%.'

summary: 12 action items: 4 critical (fix typo, remove H3 causal claims, investigate deterministic H1, rewrite abstract), 5 major (multi-seed, H_Safe, H2 zero-inflation, reframe contributions, reproducibility), 3 minor (section order, banned patterns, power calculation).
